- [ ] Corroborating source

- [ ] Translation polish

## Evidence tier (if applicable)

- [ ] CORROBORATED
- [ ] CONTESTED
- [ ] OPEN-CASE

## Bilingual check (for article edits)

- [ ] Updated `en.mdx`
- [ ] Updated `es.mdx`
- [ ] Opened follow-up issue for the missing language

## Disclosure

- [ ] I disclosed any AI assistance used.
- [ ] I am submitting under [CC BY-SA 4.0](../LICENSE) and confirm I have the right to do so.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the relevant template.
